name: Legends Of Runeterra Conversion: Fate's Voyage

cards.rules_text:
Skulk [i](This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)[/i]
When Skip enters, target opponent reveals their hand to you. You choose a nonland nonlegendary creature card from it. Exile that card. Return that card from exile to its owners hand when Skip leaves the battlefield.

Brash [i](Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with toughness 2 or less.)[/i]
Whenever Nilah attacks, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play cards exiled this way this turn.
Whenever you draw a card, put a Joy counter on Nilah. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Nilah has fifteen or more Joy counters, remove all Joy counters from Nilah, then transform her.
Partner [i](You can have two commanders if both have partner.)[/i]
cards.rules_text2:
Brash [i](Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with toughness 2 or less.)[/i]
Whenever Nilah attacks, Nilah deals 2 damage to the defending player and each creature they control. Then exile the top two cards of your library. You may play cards exiled this way this turn.

cards.rules_text: When Portia enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creatures with power and/or toughness 8 or greater, exile it. For as long as it remains exiled, it has “You may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost. When this creature enters from exile, it has base power and toughness 1/1.”
You create four Chime tokens. Target opponent creates four Puffcap tokens. Repeat this process for each card named Bursting Backpack in your graveyard.

Attune {C} [i](When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used to cast instants and sorceries.)[/i]
When Portal Pioneer enters, you may choose one —
• {U}{GW}: Destroy target equipment.
• {U}{GW}: Destroy target landmark.
• {U}{GW}: Target creature an opponent controls loses all abilities until the end of your next turn.
• {U}{GW}: Remove all damage from target creature you control. You gain 2 life.

As an additional cost to cast this spell, put a creature you control on the bottom of your library.
Reveal cards from your top of your library until you reveal a creature card, put that creature onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into the bottom of your library in a random order.
Target opponent reveals their hand, then discards a card with the highest mana value.
Recall target creature you control. Create a Hungry Owlcat token. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]
Formless Blade deals 2 damage to target creature.

When Wizened Helmsman enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal six instant and/or sorcery cards, exile two. For as long as it remains exiled, cards exiled this way has “You may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost”. Then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
Whenever an instant, sorcery, or creature ability you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus 1 instead.

When The Tidedancer enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Nilah, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
The first time each turn you cast your third spell, each creature you control gets +2/+0 and brash until end of turn. [i](Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with toughness 2 or less.)[/i]

Skulk, Attune {C} [i](This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used to cast instants and sorceries.)[/i]
When Vikrash enters, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play cards exiled this way this turn.

The first time you draw your third card on the same turn while Master Lookout is on the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter and a brash counter on Master Lookout. [i](Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with toughness 2 or less.)[/i]
When Dedicant of the Challenge enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Dedicant of the Challenge for each card in your hand, then shuffle your hand into your library and draw two cards.

Skulk [i](This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)[/i]

Deep [i](If your library has one third or fewer cards remaining, rounded down, you get The Abyssal Blessing for the rest of the game. Deep creatures you control get +3/+3 if you have The Abyssal Blessing.)[/i]
Whenever you cast a creature card, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with mana value X where X is that creatures mana value. Exile it. Until the end of turn, you may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost. Then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
Each creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Remove 2 damage from each creature you control.
Whenever you cast a creature, add one mana of any type, you may only use this mana to cast instant and sorcery spells.

Brash [i](Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with toughness 2 or less.)[/i]
Whenever you cast a spell with mana value equal to Honest Croupiers power, put a +1/+1 counter on Honest Croupier.

When Chakram Dancer enters, Chakram Dancer deals 1 damage to any target.
Whenever a creature ability you control deals damage, you gain that much life.

Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]
When Scholarly Pioneer enters, you may choose one —

• {G}{W}: Remove all damage from target creature you control. You gain 2 life.

When Dragon Allegiant enters, you may behold a dragon, if you do, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a dragon creature, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. When The Kingfisher enters, if you cast it, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X legendary creature cards, where X is the amount of white mana spent to cast it. Put those cards into your hand, then shuffle the rest into your library.
Whenever a legendary creature enters during your turn, after this phase, there is an additional combat phase. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Cloud Drake this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Cloud Drake.)[/i]
When Cloud Drake enters, until the end of turn, creatures you control cost {1} less to cast.

Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Alatis this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Alatis.)[/i]
Whenever you cast a dragon boon instant card, copy it targeting each dragon creature you control.
Put a +1/+1 creature on each bird creature you control. Then target bird creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

When Volibear enters, Volibear deals 4 damage to a random creature an opponent controls, or 2 damage to a random opponent if there are no creatures opponents control. Repeat this process twice.
Whenever a source you control deals damage, put that many Valhir counters on Volibear. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Volibear has fifty or more Valhir counters, remove all Valhir counters from Volibear, then transform him.

Trample
Whenever Volibear transforms or attacks, Volibear deals 4 damage to a random creature an opponent controls, or 2 damage to a random opponent if there are no creatures opponents control. Repeat this process twice.
Creatures you control have trample.

cards.rules_text: When Valhir's Prophet enters, create a Sigil of the Storm token.
Titanic creature spells you control costs {1} less to cast. When you cast a titanic creature spell, sacrifice Sigil of the Storm. [i](A creature with power or toughness 8 or greater is titanic.)[/i]

Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery, or whenever you activate a creature ability you control, create a Sigil of the Storm token. [i](When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.)[/i]
Stormbringer deals 4 damage to all nontitanic creatures. [i](A creature with power or toughness 8 or greater is titanic.)[/i]

Absorb 1 [i](If a source would deal damage to this creature, prevent 1 of that damage.)[/i]

Draw a card. Create a Sigil of the Storm token. [i](When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.)[/i]
When Rhond enters, create three Sigil of the Storm tokens. [i](When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.)[/i]

Lifelink

Whenever you target a creature an opponent controls, put a Fallen counter on Morgana. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Morgana has ten or more Fallen counters, remove all Fallen counters from Morgana, then transform her.

Lifelink
When Morgana transforms, enchant up to two creatures opponents control with a Curse of Shackles token.
Whenever Morgana attacks, enchant a creature with the highest power among creatures opponents control with a Curse of Shackles token that does not have one. Then Morgana deals 3 damage to each creature with an attached Curse of Shackles token and 2 damage to the defending opponent.

If you control one or more titanic creatures, Seismic Shard costs {3} less to cast. [i](A creature with power or toughness 8 or greater is titanic.)[/i]

Whenever Herald of Celestial Convergence enters, trigger the daybreak and nightfall ability of each other creature you control.

[i]Nightfall[/i] – When Herald of Celestial Convergence enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a spellshield counter on it. Bladepierced Revenant enters with a deathless counter. [i](When this creature dies, if it had one or more deathless counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a stun counter on it.)[/i]

cards.card_name: Janna, Blue Bird of the Sea
cards.rules_text:
When Janna enters, shuffle two cards from your hand into your library. At the beginning of your next upkeep, draw two cards.
The first time each turn, if you would draw your third card, exile it instead. For as long as it remains exiled, it has “You may cast this card from exile and it costs {1} less to cast”.
Whenever you cast a spell with a reduced mana cost, put a Wind counter on Janna. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Janna has eight or more Wind counters, remove all Wind counters from Janna, then transform her.
Partner [i](You can have two commanders if both have partner.)[/i]

cards.rules_text: Howling Gale deals X+2 damage to target creature where X equals each other spell you have cast this turn.
Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until the beginning of your next upkeep. Draw two cards.
Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery, or whenever you activate another creature ability you control, copy it targeting the same targets.

• Shuffle a card from your hand into your library to draw a card.
• Shuffle a card from your hand into your library to add {C}{C}{C}. This mana can only be used to cast instant and sorcery spells.

At the beginning of your end step, note the number of cards in your hand, store that note on this enchantment, then shuffle your hand into your library.
At the beginning of your upkeep, draw cards equal to the number noted on this enchantment, then clear all stored notes on this enchantment.

First strike
If you have drawn three or more cards this turn, Windborne Mariner costs {1}{UR} less to cast.

If you have drawn three or more cards this turn, Divine Whirlwind costs {U}{R} less to cast.
Divine Whirlwind deals 3 damage to target creature and 2 damage to that creatures controller.

First strike
If you have drawn three or more cards this turn, Exalted Cloudwinder costs {U}{R} less to cast.
When Exalted Cloudwinder enters, at the beginning of your next upkeep, draw two cards.

At the beginning of your upkeep, each player exiles the top card of their library. Cards exiled by opponents this way have “Until the beginning of your next end step, you may cast this card from exile”. Cards you exile this way has “For as long as it remains exiled, you may cast this card from exile”.

Whenever you draw a card while you have seven or more cards in hand, Chemtech Drake deals 1 damage to each opponent.

Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Elder Dragon this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Elder Dragon.)[/i]
Whenever another creature you control with mana value 6 or greater enters, search your library, graveyard, and/or exile for a dragon boon instant card. Cast that card targeting that creature without paying its mana cost. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
Whenever one or more creatures you control attacks, put a number of Doom counters on Elder Dragon equal to the total power among attacking creatures you control. At the beginning of your end phase, if Elder Dragon has seventy five or more Doom counters, remove all Doom counters form Elder Dragon, then transform him.

cards.rules_text:
